Cassidy Williams' Visit and Vibe Coding

03-22-2026

This past week, Dalia Abo Sheasha, a project manager for Visual Studio (not Visual Studio Code) at Microsoft visit our class. Her visit opened my eyes to the reality of how common AI use really is. Throughout this class and my own personal experiences, I've been given the impression that most people in the software development industry take advantage of AI in an organized way. Personally, that's what I do. Before Dalia visited, she had us read a Stack OverflowAI survey that proved that over half of professional developers don't plan on using AI for their projects. Combined with that article, Dalai expressed, during her visit, that many developers that he works with don't use AI extensively. I guess every developer is different.


A Poem on Vibe Coding

After reading Jake Nations' article Vibe Coding Our Way to Disaster and Namanyay's article AI Makes You Code Faster, But Ship Slower
